design_philosophy: Modern and minimalist event management SaaS. Emphasizes authority, clarity, and function-first design with high-contrast elements and generous whitespace. Brutalist structural elements paired with highly legible typography. Focus on the 'Bento Grid' for dashboards and clean dense lists for tasks.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-neutral-900
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-neutral-900

layout.spacing: Generous Spacing System: Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Dense spacing (p-3, p-4) only inside table rows.
layout.dashboard_grid: Bento Control Room: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-sm). Primary is #F04D23. Secondary is outline with border-neutral-200. High contrast focus rings.
components.cards: Flat solid surfaces with 1px border-neutral-200, no drop-shadow by default.
components.checklist_view: Tabs for phases. Dense list format (border-collapse). Each row is border-b border-neutral-100.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized to rounded-sm. Focus state: ring-2 ring-brand_primary/20 border-brand_primary.
components.collaboration_avatars: Small overlapping circles (w-8 h-8) in header top-right, 2px white border.

interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts (hover:bg-neutral-50) for rows. Buttons -translate-y-[1px] with shadow-md.

testing.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='add-task-button').

hero_background.description: Modern architecture for landing or login abstraction.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'lucide-react' for icons. Do NOT use generic text as icons.
Add 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' to fonts via Google Fonts or standard imports.
Implement standard layout: Sidebar for main navigation (Dashboard, Checklists, Templates, Reports) and top header for global actions & real-time collaboration avatars.
Build the IMPACTO Event Dashboard with the Bento grid pattern, utilizing large typography for stats.
For the checklist module, use Tabs ('Antes', 'Durante', 'Após'). Inside each tab, list categories and tasks. Do NOT wrap every task in a bulky Shadcn Card. Use a flat border-collapse list structure.
Include a Shadcn DatePicker/Calendar for task deadlines.
Add a Modal/Dialog for assigning members to a task.
Add progress bars matching the status colors for event completion overview.
The SaaS has NO auth required, so start the user directly in an 'Open Access' screen containing a selection/creation of Checklists, featuring the hero_background subtly.
